title: Employer FAQs
text:
Employer FAQs
NYU Shanghai is the first Sino-U.S. joint research university in China and the third degree-granting campus of NYU. For a detailed description, see our University Description.
The estimated cost of attendance is shown on our Cost of Attendance page.
NYU Shanghai utilizes a rigorous admissions process to select top students from around the world. To learn more about our application process, see our Admissions page.
NYU Shanghai offers a variety of undergraduate majors in a liberal arts style curriculum, as well as several graduate-level programs. For a full list of academic specializations, see our list of Majors and Minors.
We offer many services to support employers in engaging with our student body. For more information, see our Recruitment & Engagement page.
